Lots of grapes all over parking area and fences and trees
Few trees around parking lot and in woods
Yates Store Rd, just below Amberly neighborhood.  Follow walking path, then enter woods.

There is a massive black walnut tree in here.  Park along the road, then follow the walking path.  Cross into the woods, and look up.  You can't miss it, it's HUGE!  Watch out for holes in the ground, though!  The creeping grass and vines cover them up.
